form.formComment: Solid performance when beaten by 2.75 m finishing second behind Miki's Deal at this track over 1609m in a 3yo+ on February 26 at $8.80. Then a handy effort when beaten by 8 m finishing third behind Captain Amore at this track over 1609m in a 4yo+ on March 26 at $2.20. One of the primary contenders.

form.formComment: Nine-year-old mare showed improvement last start. Posted a big 6 m win (Fr7) at Ascot Park Raceway (2:44.40) beating Rise Up N Dance in on April 2 at $12. The run before was not as impressive when well beaten into fourth behind Jaccka Elvis at this track over 2400m in a 4yo+ on March 26 at $68.80. Might find this beyond her.
